name: WebGL API
performance_characteristics: GPU-accelerated 2D/3D rendering capable of complex scenes and shaders; high GPU/power draw and verbose low-level API
strengths: Baseline everywhere; GPU-accelerated real-time 3D and shader rendering in the browser
Mature ecosystem (Three.js, Babylon.js, PixiJS) built on top of it
Handles complex scenes, lighting and post-processing impractical for canvas 2D
Broad, stable cross-device and mobile support after a decade of deployment
weaknesses: High GPU and battery cost; inappropriate for low-power or dense enterprise UI
Verbose, low-level API (based on OpenGL ES); steep learning curve without a library
No DOM semantics or built-in accessibility; everything is opaque pixels
Older API design than WebGPU; less efficient for compute and modern GPU features
